seo.title: Google Ads Management | Fillip Technologies
seo.description: Google Ads campaign management focused on qualified leads, conversions, and measurable return on ad spend.

hero.title: Grow your business with
hero.description: Reach high-intent customers and generate measurable leads through strategically managed Google Ads campaigns.
hero.metricLabel: Campaigns optimized for measurable business growth

philosophy.title: Capture Existing Demand.
philosophy.lead: More clicks do not automatically create more customers.
philosophy.support: We optimize for qualified actions and profitable growth.
philosophy.description: Successful Google Ads campaigns connect search intent, relevant messaging, landing pages, conversion tracking, and continuous bid optimization.
philosophy.caption: Intent and relevance drive stronger returns

workflow.title: From Search Intent to
workflow.description: We build campaigns around customer intent, measurable actions, and continuous performance improvement.

steps.title: Keyword & Competitor Research
steps.description: We identify valuable searches, customer intent, competitors, and campaign opportunities.

steps.title: Campaign Build & Launch
steps.description: We structure campaigns, write relevant ads, configure targeting, and validate conversion tracking.

steps.title: Optimize & Scale
steps.description: We improve bids, search terms, ads, audiences, and budgets using conversion data.

results.title: Performance You Can
results.description: Campaign decisions focus on qualified conversions, efficient acquisition costs, and sustainable return on ad spend.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Common questions about Google Ads management.

items.question: Which Google Ads campaigns do you manage?
items.answer: We manage Search, Display, Shopping, Performance Max, remarketing, and other campaign types based on your goals.
